title: Principal Instructional Designer at BSC Academy

jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at BSC Academy
jsonLd.description:
BSC Academy invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About BSC Academy:
BSC Academy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSC Academy!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
